projects.title: Vectorize Illustration for Large Prints
projects.full_description:
I have an illustration that must be converted into a clean, fully-scalable vector so it can be printed at banner size and then contour-cut with perfect edges. I need the artwork rebuilt from my raster file, keeping every color, gradient, and fine detail intact while eliminating all pixel data.

Please work in Adobe Illustrator (or comparable vector software) and deliver the final artwork as an EPS file—this is the format my print house requires. An editable AI or SVG copy is a welcome bonus, but the EPS is essential. All paths should be closed, shapes properly grouped, and any text outlined so nothing shifts when the file is opened elsewhere.

Once finished, I’ll run a test-scale print, so accurate proportions and a crisp contour line around the design are critical acceptance criteria. If you’re confident handling large-format prep and can turn this around quickly, I’d love to collaborate.
projects.description_snippet: I have an illustration that must be converted into a clean, fully-scalable vector so it can be printed at banner size and then contour-cut with perfect edges. I need the artwork rebuilt from my raster file, keeping every color, gradient, and fine det

projects.title: LinkedIn Marketing Specialist for B2B Campaigns
projects.full_description:
I need an experienced LinkedIn marketer who can turn our company page and my personal profile into a steady pipeline of qualified B2B leads. My priority is clear: generate measurable, sales-ready leads from small and mid-sized businesses, not vanity metrics.

Here is what success looks like for me:

• A well-structured LinkedIn strategy built around compelling organic visual content think eye-catching infographics, short carousels, and videos paired with precisely targeted paid ads that move prospects through the funnel. 
• Campaigns configured and optimized inside Campaign Manager, with audience segments, ad formats, and bid strategies chosen for cost-efficient lead generation. 
• Consistent testing and iteration of creatives, copy, and calls-to-action so we can scale what works and cut what doesn’t. 
• A clear reporting cadence that shows leads captured, CPL, and downstream conversion data so I always know the ROI of your work.

I already have brand guidelines, existing posts, and a CRM ready to receive LinkedIn lead-gen form data. You will plug in quickly, propose any additional tools you need (Sales Navigator, automation, analytics), and then execute.
only apply if you have real B2B LinkedIn marketing experience, a strong execution mindset,

If you have a proven record of delivering B2B leads on LinkedIn and can back it up with numbers, let’s talk.
projects.description_snippet: I need an experienced LinkedIn marketer who can turn our company page and my personal profile into a steady pipeline of qualified B2B leads. My priority is clear: generate measurable, sales-ready leads from small and mid-sized businesses, not vanity

projects.title: Recurring Charges - Upcoming Transactions
projects.full_description:
I have an Excel workbook that tracks recurring charges. All raw entries live on the “data” sheet; the “Upcoming transactions” sheet is meant to show what’s on the horizon. Right now I type a reference date manually into one cell on that second sheet, and I’d like everything below it to update automatically.

Here’s what the improved sheet must do:

• In the "data" sheet. Add an automated column "Next Payment Date" - based on the frequency selected it should auto-enter the next payment date. For example, if the date of transaction is 03/12/2026 it should enter next payment date as 04/12/2026. It'll be a one time thing so it doesn't need to generate every month's payment date like 04/12/2026, 05/12/2026 etc. Because when the next charge goes through bank I will enter that one into "data" sheet which will then create next month's expected charge date.
• Read the date I type in “Upcoming transactions”, pull every charge from the “data” sheet "next" payment date" that falls within the next 30 days, and list them immediately—no refresh button, no extra clicks. 
• Apply a yellow conditional-format highlight to any of those charges occurring in the next 7 days of the date I type in "upcoming transactions". Everything else inside the 30-day window should remain un-highlighted but showup.
• Re-calculate and re-apply the highlight the moment I change that top-cell date.
• This file will be in SharePoint
• Do not disclose any information on the file

I’m fine if you solve this with dynamic array formulas, Power Query, VBA, or any mix; I just need it to be reliable and easy to maintain. When the work is done I should be able to drop a new transaction into “data”, type any date I want in “Upcoming transactions”, and immediately see an accurate, color-coded preview of the next month’s charges.

Deliverable: the updated workbook with clean, commented formulas or code so I can tweak it in the future if needed.
Deadline - By Midnight 05/20/2026 PST
projects.description_snippet: I have an Excel workbook that tracks recurring charges. All raw entries live on the “data” sheet; the “Upcoming transactions” sheet is meant to show what’s on the horizon. Right now I type a reference date manually into one cell on that second sheet,

projects.title: Student's Personal Finance Web App
projects.full_description:
Project Title
Student Budget Tracker Web Application
Project Description
I am looking for a developer to build a simple Student Budget Tracker web application.
The purpose of the application is to help students record their income and expenses, track their remaining balance, and understand their spending habits. The application should be simple, clean, easy to use, and suitable for demonstration on a laptop browser.
The application does not need a complex login system or external database. A lightweight web application using browser local storage is preferred.
Required Features
The application should include the following features:
Income Tracking


The user should be able to add income records.
Each income record should include date, amount, source, and optional notes.
Example income sources may include part-time job, allowance, scholarship, and other.
The user should be able to edit and delete income records.
Expense Tracking


The user should be able to add expense records.
Each expense record should include date, amount, category, and optional notes.
Expense categories should include food, rent, transport, entertainment, shopping, study, and other.
The user should be able to edit and delete expense records.
Budget Summary


The app should automatically calculate:
Total income.
Total expenses.
Remaining balance.
The summary should update automatically when records are added, edited, or deleted.
Spending by Category


The app should show how much money has been spent in each expense category.
A simple chart, such as a pie chart or bar chart, would be preferred.
If a chart library is used, it should be simple and reliable.
Monthly View


The user should be able to view income and expenses for the current month.
A simple monthly filter is enough.
The app should show monthly income, monthly expenses, and monthly balance.
CSV Export


The user should be able to export income and expense records as a CSV file.
The exported file should include dates, amounts, categories or sources, notes, and record type.
Data Saving


Income records, expense records, and categories should be saved in the browser using local storage.
The user should not lose data after refreshing or closing the browser.
User Interface


The design should be simple, clean, and easy to understand.
The application should work on desktop and mobile screen sizes.
The main dashboard should clearly show income, expenses, and balance.
Optional Feature


A simple budget limit warning would be preferred but is not essential.
For example, if monthly expenses exceed a user-defined budget, the app can show a warning message.
Deliverables
The developer should provide:
A fully working web application.
All source code files.
Simple setup instructions.
A short user guide explaining how to use the application.
A demo link if possible, or a zip file that can run locally in a browser.
Technical Requirements
The application can be built using simple web technologies such as:
HTML
CSS
JavaScript
A framework such as React is acceptable, but not required.
The final product should be easy to run locally on a laptop browser. If a framework is used, clear setup instructions must be provided.
No complex login system, payment system, or external database is required.
Timeline
The project should be completed within 4-6 days after the project is awarded.
Please provide progress updates during development, especially after the income tracking, expense tracking, and summary functions are working.
Budget
The budget for this project is approximately NZD 100.
Please provide your best offer and estimated delivery time.
Acceptance Criteria
The project will be accepted when all of the following conditions are met:
The user can add, edit, and delete income records.
The user can add, edit, and delete expense records.
The app correctly calculates total income, total expenses, and remaining balance.
The app shows spending by category.
The app provides a simple monthly view or monthly filter.
The user can export records as a CSV file.
Data is saved after refreshing or closing the browser.
The app works properly on a laptop browser.
The app has a simple and responsive user interface.
The source code and setup instructions are provided.
Additional Notes
Please keep the application simple and reliable rather than adding too many extra features. The most important requirement is that the income tracking, expense tracking, calculation, and data saving functions work correctly.
Please include examples of any similar work you have done before when submitting your bid.
projects.description_snippet: Project Title Student Budget Tracker Web Application Project Description I am looking for a developer to build a simple Student Budget Tracker web application. The purpose of the application is to help students record their income and expenses, track

projects.title: Video Creation Mastery Trainer Needed
projects.full_description:
I want to move from “idea” to a finished, video without relying on outside editors. To do that, I’m looking for a trainer who can walk me through the full workflow: scripting, or sourcing footage, adding real-life characters, recording and mixing voice-overs, layering music and sound effects, then finishing with eye-catching edits, transitions, titles, colour work and the kind of special effects that keep viewers watching.

My top priority is learning how to blend live-action elements with clear, well-produced voice-overs, but I’m also eager to understand AI avatars, basic animation, motion graphics and any extra tricks you rely on to make a clip look “studio” quality. As for software, I’m flexible—whether you prefer Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve or another reliable tool, I’m happy to install and follow along.

The ideal engagement includes:
• A structured, step-by-step curriculum (recorded or live) that starts from absolute scratch and builds toward a polished, entertaining video. 
• Hands-on demonstrations where we create at least one complete project together so I can replicate the process on my own. 
• Clear feedback on my practice edits plus reference project files I can dissect afterward.

If that sounds like the kind of teaching you love to do, let’s schedule our first session and outline the roadmap.

projects.title: Virginia PE to Stamp Foundation Plans
projects.full_description:
I am seeking a Virginia-licensed Professional Engineer (PE) to recreate and stamp foundation plans for a modular/mobile home installation located in Culpeper County, Virginia.

I already have existing manufacturer foundation drawings and details (attached for reference), including:
• Foundation plan layout
• Pier and footing details
• Structural load limitations
• Tie-down/anchor details
• Foundation notes and sections

Scope of Work:
• Recreate/redraw the foundation plans in professional engineering format
• Review/adapt the design as needed for Virginia code and local requirements
• Provide signed and sealed Virginia PE foundation drawings suitable for County permit submission
• Coordinate minor revisions if requested by the County
• Deliver final PDF set and editable CAD files (if available)

Project Details:
• Modular/mobile home installation
• Culpeper County, Virginia
• Existing soil report available
• Existing manufacturer plans available for reference
• Need expedited turnaround if possible

Requirements:
• Active Virginia Professional Engineer (PE) license
• Ability to stamp/seal residential foundation plans in Virginia
• Experience with manufactured/modular/mobile home foundation systems preferred
• Familiarity with Culpeper County permitting is a plus

Please include:

PE license information
Relevant experience
Estimated turnaround time
Total cost proposal
Examples of similar work (if available)

The objective is to obtain permit-ready, engineer-sealed foundation plans based on the attached manufacturer design documents.

projects.title: Residential PV Panel Install & Survey
projects.full_description:
I’m ready to take my single-story home off the ever-rising power-bill treadmill and would like a complete photovoltaic solution. Before we move ahead, I need a qualified solar professional who can:

• visit the property, measure the roof, check orientation, shading and structural load on my existing single-story roof 
• translate those findings into a clear, itemised quotation that spells out panel count, inverter capacity, mounting hardware, labour, permits and projected kWh output 
• handle the full installation once the quote is approved—mounting, wiring, grid-tie, monitoring setup, final inspection and commissioning paperwork

Everything must meet local building codes, electrical standards and utility interconnection rules. NABCEP-certified (or equivalent) installers are preferred, and I’ll appreciate manufacturer-backed warranties on panels, inverters and workmanship.

If you’re comfortable surveying a residential roof and then delivering a turnkey PV system, let’s set up a site visit and get this project moving.

projects.title: Long-Term Jewellery Marketplace Assistant
projects.full_description:
I run a growing artificial-jewellery brand and need reliable help keeping our online shelves full and tidy across Meesho, Shopsy and Flipkart. Product listing will be your main focus—titles, descriptions, images, categories and variants must all land in the right place so shoppers find exactly what they want. If you already feel confident handling listings, know your way around those three marketplaces and are very familiar with variant management, you will slip into the role quickly.

What the day-to-day looks like 
• Create and publish new listings from the raw product data and photos I supply 
• Check images, crop or compress when needed and upload them in the right sequence 
• Craft clear, keyword-friendly titles and polished descriptions that highlight materials, size options and style cues 
• Select the correct categories, attributes and tags so the catalogue stays organised 
• Add colour, size and design variants accurately and keep stock counts synced 
• Handle basic marketplace tasks such as price edits, offer activations and order-related tweaks

I provide step-by-step video guidance, templates and periodic feedback; you bring basic computer skills, a steady internet connection and the willingness to learn and grow with the brand. An interest in fashion or jewellery helps, but consistency and sincerity matter most. This is a long-term collaboration, not a short gig, so only apply if you can commit for the foreseeable future and treat the store as your own.

Deliverables I review each week 
1. New listings live on all three platforms without errors 
2. Variant matrices complete and accurate 
3. Titles and descriptions aligned with provided SEO guidelines 
4. Image sets optimised for speed and clarity 
5. Marketplace dashboards free of pending tasks or alerts

If this sounds like the kind of partnership you have been seeking, tell me about your past Meesho, Shopsy or Flipkart work and share a short example listing you built. Let us grow together.
projects.description_snippet: I run a growing artificial-jewellery brand and need reliable help keeping our online shelves full and tidy across Meesho, Shopsy and Flipkart. Product listing will be your main focus—titles, descriptions, images, categories and variants must all land

Some logos may require vectorization, and freelancers should advise on per-logo vectorization costs, if applicable.

- Logos will be supplied by June 5th.
- Final files for print need to be ready by July 1st.
- Typical edits from the client are to be expected as part of the process.

Ideal Freelancer: Someone experienced in large-format event print designs who can manage tight deadlines and collaborate well.
Deliverables:
- Creative concepts for Phase 1.
- Print-ready materials for Phase 2 by the specified deadline.

projects.title: Resolve Google Merchant Policy Suspension
projects.full_description:
My Google Merchant Center account is currently suspended for “Policy violations” and I need it back online quickly. I’m looking for someone who has already reinstated accounts under this exact notice and understands the nuances of Google Shopping policies.

What I need:
• A thorough audit of the feed, website and account settings to identify every policy conflict 
• Clear, step-by-step fixes implemented directly in the feed or on-site as required 
• A well-structured appeal drafted and submitted through Merchant Center, with any follow-up handled until Google lifts the suspension

Please let me know how you normally approach this kind of suspension, what tools you use for feed cleanup or policy checks, and the typical timeframe you’ve seen for reinstatement. I’ll provide full access to the Merchant Center, product feed and site once we agree to proceed.

projects.title: We need React/Next.js Developer to Upgrade Existing Website

Our live applications are built with React and [login to view URL] and backed by a Laravel REST API. The immediate need is clear: build and refine truly responsive interfaces, with special attention to large-screen desktop layouts that scale smoothly down to tablets and phones. 

You’ll work inside an established codebase, shaping new page structures, tightening CSS, and ensuring every component behaves perfectly at 1920 px and beyond. While responsive work is the first milestone, the role naturally expands into polishing existing UI, wiring up new API endpoints, and shipping fresh features. Clean, extensible code is a must, as future iterations will layer on TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, performance passes, and SEO enhancements. 

Consistent communication is important here; I tend to push updates in short, focused sprints and appreciate quick checkpoints on progress or blockers.

Deliverables for the initial phase: 
• Modernised page layouts that pass visual QA on all major desktop browsers 
• Flex- or grid-based CSS that responds gracefully down to mobile breakpoints 
• Components hooked to existing Laravel endpoints with clear, typed props and error handling 
• Brief inline documentation so the rest of the team can extend your work easily 

Follow-up phases will tackle UI polish, additional API work, and performance tuning. If building crisp, responsive experiences in React and [login to view URL] is your strong suit, let’s get started.

projects.title: Weekly US TikTok Trend Reports
projects.full_description:
I monitor several TikTok-focused projects and need a dependable partner to keep me ahead of the curve in the American market. Every week I want a concise, insight-rich report that surfaces the clips gaining the fastest traction in dance challenges, funny skits, educational content and any other emerging trend you detect.

Deliverables 
• A spreadsheet or slide deck delivered each Friday containing 20-30 video links, creator handles, current view counts and a brief note on why each clip is taking off (music choice, hashtag mix, editing style, etc.). 
• A summary page outlining overarching patterns plus your predictions for what could break out next week. 
• A running archive so we can track how trends evolve over time.

I will evaluate you on timeliness, accuracy and, most importantly, your ability to spot a format or meme before it peaks. Maintain that quality and this can turn into long-term, ongoing work.

projects.title: Commission B2B AI Automation Sales
projects.full_description:
At RXON, we deploy next-generation AI automation solutions, virtual concierge systems, and automated voice representatives for high-value businesses. We don’t believe in traditional corporate micro-management or endless alignment meetings. We believe in performance, data, and absolute execution freedom.
We are expanding our network and looking for independent, hungry B2B Sales Professionals / Appointment Setters who want complete control over their workflow and pipeline ownership.
The Model: Total Autonomy
We don’t trap you in a specific niche. Our AI solutions are highly demanded across almost every industry (Medical/Dental Clinics, Real Estate, Premium Automotive, Gyms, and E-commerce). You have 100% freedom to target the vertical you are most confident in, using your own infrastructure and strategies.
 Our Filter: The 10-Day Performance Validation
We don’t do long interview loops or introductory discovery calls. We let live results do the talking.
To join our core team, you will enter an immediate 10-Day Live Challenge:
1 The Target: Bring in exactly 1 successful, closed client deal within 10 days.
2 The Support: Once you are ready to begin, we will instantly equip you with our vetted marketing assets:
 Our Core FAQ Sheet
 RXON Sales Agent Playbook
 Our High-Converting Free Audit Protocol (Your main sales hook)
3 The Reward: The moment that 1st deal is closed and verified, you immediately unlock our long-term hybrid contract framework, dedicated GHL CRM dashboard access, and our high-tier commission multipliers.
 Who You Are:
 You have experience navigating trust gaps with high-level B2B decision-makers.
 You prefer commission-heavy models because you know you can close and don't rely on basic retainers to survive.
 You operate with a professional, executive, and consultative tone (No spammy or high-pressure tactics).
 You are proactive and ready to run your own outbound campaigns.
 Compensation Structure:
 Phase 1 (10-Day Trial): Commission-Only per closed deal.

projects.title: LinkedIn & Facebook Group Contact Scrape
projects.full_description:
I need a reliable way to pull every publicly available contact detail from more than ten LinkedIn and Facebook Groups. Both platforms matter to me equally, so the workflow has to switch smoothly between the two and respect their different rate limits, anti-bot checks, and privacy policies.

Scope 
Each chosen group may contain hundreds or even thousands of members. From every member profile I want the following, whenever it can be found: full name, profile URL, current job title, company, location, plus any email address or phone number that is visible either on the profile itself or through permitted enrichment techniques.

Data handling 
I expect the scraping to run through a proven stack—Python with Selenium or Playwright, Phantombuster, TexAu, or another dependable solution is fine as long as it stays within the platforms’ terms of service. Captcha bypasses, rotating residential proxies, and time-spaced requests are essential so accounts are not flagged.

Deliverables 
• An .xlsx or .csv file for each individual group 
• Columns: Group name, Member name, Profile URL, Title, Company, Location, Email, Phone, Other notes 
• One consolidated master file with all groups merged, duplicates removed, ready for import into my CRM

Acceptance 
I will run random checks against at least 5 % of the rows. A successful job means 95 %+ accuracy on those samples, no dead profile links, and no banned accounts during or after extraction.

Let me know your proposed toolset, estimated turnaround time, and any limits on daily scraping volume.
projects.description_snippet: I need a reliable way to pull every publicly available contact detail from more than ten LinkedIn and Facebook Groups. Both platforms matter to me equally, so the workflow has to switch smoothly between the two and respect their different rate limits

About the Client:
We are a boutique product development team. We are currently finalizing a pitch for a major traditional publishing house and require high-fidelity, commercial-grade vector illustrations to serve as our proof-of-concept.

Project Overview:
We are pitching a stationery product concept and need hand illustrated mock-ups of the product. We have renderings which can be used as reference material.

CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: STRICTLY NO AI
Because this pitch is going to a traditional publisher with a zero-tolerance policy for generative AI, all submitted work must be 100% human-created, original vector art. We will require the raw working files (e.g., .AI or .EPS) upon completion. Any use of AI generation will result in immediate cancellation of the contract.

Scope of Work (3 Deliverables):
We need three highly polished, realistic product renderings/layouts to include in our pitch deck. We will provide the specifics upon hiring a freelancer.

Note on IP: These stamps must evoke specific travel themes but must be 100% generic and legally distinct from any existing intellectual property or trademarks.

Ideal Freelancer Profile:

Expertise in Adobe Illustrator and commercial vector illustration.

Strong portfolio showcasing mid-century modern, vintage travel poster, or retro-futuristic aesthetics.

Experience in product mockup rendering (making 2D art look like physical stationery).

Willingness to sign a standard NDA and IP Assignment agreement (all rights transfer to us upon payment).

projects.title: Bulk WhatsApp Campaign Strategy
projects.full_description:
I have a clean list of about 100,000 Indian phone numbers and I’m ready to introduce a new physical product to them through WhatsApp. The goal is straightforward: promote the product in a professional, formal tone without tripping any spam filters and while remaining fully compliant with WhatsApp policies. 

I need a marketer who can take ownership of everything from concept to delivery—refining the core offer, crafting a formally worded template, guiding it through template approval (WhatsApp Business API), segmenting the list, scheduling batches, and monitoring performance in real time. Hands-on experience with bulk-messaging platforms such as WhatsApp Business API, Twilio, WATI, Gupshup, or similar is a must so we stay within platform limits and still reach the whole audience quickly. 

Deliverables 
• One formally written, pre-approved WhatsApp message template promoting the product 
• A sending plan that spells out batching, timing, opt-out language, and compliance steps 
• Execution of the broadcast to the full 100,000-number list 
• Post-campaign report covering sent, delivered, read rates, and user replies 

If you’ve managed large-scale WhatsApp promotions before—especially for physical products—let me know the tools you used and the delivery or engagement metrics you achieved. I’m open to creative ideas that keep us compliant yet maximize reach and response.

projects.title: Embedded Systems Research Assistant – Assistive Technology Project
projects.full_description:
I am seeking a motivated Embedded Systems Research Assistant to support the development, simulation, and experimental validation of a low-cost electronic assistive subsystem for blind and visually impaired users. The project focuses on electronics-level performance, including power consumption, response latency, communication reliability, and system efficiency.

The work will involve MATLAB/Simulink modelling, ESP32-based hardware setup, sensor interfacing, audio/haptic feedback systems, and bench-level experimental validation.

The successful candidate will:
- Develop and test MATLAB/Simulink models for an embedded assistive system.
- Support the design of an ESP32-based prototype using sensors, communication modules, and feedback devices.
- Model system operating modes such as idle, sensing, processing, communication, and feedback.
- Measure power consumption, latency, response time, and communication reliability.
- Assist with experimental validation using bench-level hardware.
- Compare simulation results with real hardware measurements.
- Prepare plots, tables, technical notes, and documentation for project reporting.
-Support troubleshooting of embedded circuits, sensor communication, and data logging.

Required Skills and Experience
- Embedded systems and microcontroller-based design.
- ESP32, Arduino, or similar development boards.
- MATLAB and Simulink modelling.
- I2C, I2S, UART, BLE, or Wi-Fi communication.
- Basic electronic circuit design and testing.
- Sensor interfacing, especially IMU or distance sensors.
- Data collection, analysis, and performance evaluation.
- Power measurement and latency testing.

The Research Assistant will contribute to:

- A MATLAB/Simulink model of the assistive subsystem.
- Power consumption and latency measurement results.
- Simulation versus experimental comparison.
- Design recommendations for low-cost assistive electronics.
- Supporting documentation for the final research report.

This role is suitable for an engineering student, graduate, or early-career researcher with strong interest in embedded systems, electronics, assistive technology, and simulation-based design. The ideal candidate should be practical, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with both software models and physical hardware.
projects.description_snippet: I am seeking a motivated Embedded Systems Research Assistant to support the development, simulation, and experimental validation of a low-cost electronic assistive subsystem for blind and visually impaired users. The project focuses on electronics-le

projects.title: Local Researcher Required for Document Scanning
projects.full_description:
I need a local researcher who lives near to or lives in Berkeley, California in the United States of America, to go in person to the Graduate Theological Union Library, 2400 Ridge Road, Berkeley, CA 94709, USA. This library is open to the public so no library membership card is needed to gain entry to it. 

The researcher will physically access 2 books which are out of copyright and in the public domain and scan the entirety of both books in the PDF Format. These books have not been digitised and are not online so you will be working with physical copies. The scan needs to be checked to ensure that no pages from the books have been missed. 

A public domain verification document is provided here for the researcher to prove that the books are out of copyright and in the public domain and can therefore be scanned in their entirety. This document should be taken to the library in case proof of public domain status is asked for by a librarian. 

The scans need to be checked for viruses and malware by using the free check at website https://metadefender.com. This involves uploading the file and then running the scan. Due to the size of the PDF documents the researcher may need to compress each PDF. The researcher will then email the scans to the person who is posting this job. 

Here are the book details: 

Author: Garabed Paelian 
Title: Modern Science and the Yoga of the Future 
Publisher: Astara Foundation, Los Angeles Publication Year: 1957 
Library Call No. [login to view URL] P332 

Author: Frances Paelian 
Title: The Cosmic Dynamic 
Publisher: Astara Foundation, Los Angeles Publication Year: 1962 
Library Call No. [login to view URL] P32 

The researcher will need the following skills: (1) be able to use the scanner available at the library to scan the books. The library has a top-down scanner (to create PDFs). Please bring a flash drive to save images from the scanner. (2) be able to upload the scans and check the scans are not infected with any virus or malware by using the following website [login to view URL] for a free scan of the documents (3) be able to take a screenshot of each scan result prove the scans were checked (4) be able to compress the file if this is needed to send it by email (5) be able to send the scanned and checked documents via email.

projects.full_description:
Each month I require the services of a Registered Nurse to deliver in-home care for adult patients (18–65) who are managing mental health issues. Typical visits will involve administering prescribed medications, monitoring vital signs, documenting progress in the home-care EMR, liaising with psychiatrists or primary physicians when thresholds are exceeded, and providing compassionate education to both patients and their families on coping strategies and safety planning.

Scheduling is arranged a month in advance so we can lock in visit dates and times that suit both you and the client household. After every visit, I expect a concise electronic report outlining observations, interventions performed, any changes in mental status, and recommendations for follow-up.

To succeed you must hold an active RN license valid for home-care practice, current CPR/BLS certification, and professional liability coverage. Experience with community mental health, medication management, and crisis de-escalation will be highly valued.

projects.title: Flat-Fee SSDI CDR Assistance
projects.full_description:
I have a single Social Security Disability Insurance client who just received a Continuing Disability Review packet. The SSA has already granted a 30-day extension, but the file shows an erroneous “work” flag even though the claimant is unemployed and benefits are still being paid. All Humana medical, pharmacy, and dental claims for the past year are neatly logged in spreadsheets and ready for you.

Here is what I need from you on a flat-fee basis, carried out entirely online:

• Review the CDR notice and current SSA status to confirm deadlines, spot any additional issues, and flag missing evidence. 
• Complete—or carefully review if I have drafted—Form SSA-454, ensuring every section is accurate and persuasive. 
• Draft a concise, fact-based statement that corrects the incorrect “work” notation and reinforces continued disability. 

We will handle any overpayment questions in-house, and the client already has a submission checklist, so those items are off your plate.

To be considered, please send: 
1. A brief summary of your SSDI/CDR experience (paralegal or non-attorney representative work is fine). 
2. Your proposed flat fee for the entire scope above. 
3. Your estimated turnaround time once you receive the file (the sooner the better given the ticking extension).

Everything is remote—no court appearances, no SSI issues—just focused SSDI assistance. I respond quickly to messages and can supply the organized medical spreadsheets and the scanned CDR packet as soon as we agree. Looking forward to partnering with someone who knows this process inside and out.

I am seeking an experienced TCPA defense attorney for a paid consultation regarding an active federal lawsuit in which my company has been named as a third-party defendant.

Case No. 0:26-cv-01646-LMP-EMB — U.S. District Court, District of Minnesota. Original plaintiff Aaron Brown sued Northwest Partners LLLP (Keller Williams brokerage) for unsolicited texts to his DNC-registered number. Northwest Partners filed a third-party complaint against my companies — Lazy Cow Media, LLC and We Hunt Clients, LLC — claiming we are responsible as their lead generation and CRM vendor.

Our Response Deadline: June 4, 2026

Licensed attorney with active TCPA defense experience
Specifically experienced with lead generation company / CRM vendor liability cases
Familiar with third-party and vicarious liability TCPA defense
Available for a 60-minute video or phone consultation this week

Deliverable:
60-minute paid consultation call with written summary of recommendations afterward (optional but preferred)

Budget: $150–$500 for the consultation
(I understand rates vary — please state your rate and experience level in your proposal)

Note: I am also in discussions with several established TCPA defense firms. This consultation is to gather additional expert perspectives before making a final decision on legal representation. I am not necessarily looking for full representation through this posting, though I am open to it if the fit is right.

• respects my current company filters and date ranges, 
• runs quickly even on large datasets.

2. A short read-me (or screen-share) showing how to load, configure, and toggle the report on and off. 

If you have built similar summary reports in Tally Prime before, let me know—speed of deployment matters.

projects.title: Dairy Export Consultant Needed
projects.full_description:
I run a well-established dairy unit in India and I’m ready to scale our ghee and milk-powder sales beyond domestic borders. All core production lines already carry multiple certifications, so compliance with EU and Asian import standards (think FSSAI, APEDA registration, HACCP, ISO 22000) is in place. 

What I need now is an export-savvy consultant who understands every step from documentation to door delivery and, most importantly, can open doors to serious buyers. Europe and Asia are my first target regions, and I’m open to working with retailers, wholesalers, or distributors—whichever route secures consistent volume and fair margins.

Please be prepared to:
• Map a region-specific export plan covering logistics, tariffs, and required health certificates. 
• Short-list and introduce verified retailers, wholesalers and distributors, supplying contact details and initial interest. 
• Guide me through customs procedures, EU TRACES entries, port handling, and any country-specific sanitary approvals. 
• Outline a feasible timeline and milestones for first purchase orders.

Success will be measured by the delivery of at least three qualified buyer leads per region and a clear, step-by-step export roadmap ready for execution. If you already maintain a strong network in the dairy trade and can move quickly, let’s talk about next steps.

projects.title: Fluid Systems Engineering for Fertilizer Assembly
projects.full_description:
I am looking for a mechanical/fluid systems engineer to review and improve a small liquid distribution assembly.

The system will distribute UAN liquid fertilizer— urea ammonium nitrate solution — through a main hose, multiple branch connections, small calibrated orifices, and flexible outlet hoses.

Scope of work:

- review the current CAD concept,
- simulate or calculate liquid flow through the system,
- check pressure drop and flow balance between multiple outlets,
- verify whether the current orifice size is suitable,
- suggest design improvements if needed,
- recommend sealing method, materials, and serviceable connections,
- optionally modify the CAD design.

The liquid is a corrosive agricultural fertilizer solution, so experience with hydraulic systems, fluid distribution, manifolds, pressure drop, or chemical-resistant fittings is preferred.

I will provide CAD screenshots/files, dimensions, expected flow rate, pump capacity, hose layout, and operating pressure.

I need a practical engineering solution, not only theory.

Please apply only if you have experience with fluid flow calculations, small manifolds, or hydraulic/chemical liquid systems

+++This is important—you also need to be an engineer who can come up with better components or solutions

projects.title: Zoho Creator Portal - Customer Project Setup
projects.full_description:
I already have a Zoho Creator portal with basic customer functions like create account and login. Now I want customers to create and manage their own projects in the portal. When someone logs in, they should be able to click “New Project,” fill out a streamlined form and, once they submit, see the record instantly in a dashboard while the relevant people receive notifications. From there I will expand the solution, so a clean, well-structured foundation is critical.

Please read attachment for full details. 

Budget non negotiable.
